name: RE Workflow E — Enrichment & HubSpot Push

parameters.jsCode:
const records = $input.item.json.records || [];
return records.map(r => ({
  json: {
    record_id: r.id,
    agent_name: r.fields.agent_name || '',
    agency_name: r.fields.agency_name || '',
    website: r.fields.website || '',
    domain: r.fields.domain || '',
    phone: r.fields.phone || '',
    address: r.fields.address || '',
    city: r.fields.city || '',
    state: r.fields.state || '',
    zip_code: r.fields.zip_code || '',
    google_rating: r.fields.google_rating || null,
    review_count: r.fields.review_count || 0,
    has_live_chat: r.fields.has_live_chat || false,
    response_time_minutes: r.fields.response_time_minutes || null,
    ai_score: r.fields.ai_score || 0,
    ai_signals: r.fields.ai_signals || '',
    ai_summary: r.fields.ai_summary || ''
  }
}));

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ q_organization_domains: [$json.domain], person_titles: ['real estate agent', 'realtor', 'broker', 'owner'], page: 1, per_page: 5 }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const prev = $('Extract Best Email').item.json;
return [{ json: { ...prev, apollo_error: true } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ properties: { firstname: $json.hs_firstname, lastname: $json.hs_lastname, email: $json.contact_email || '', phone: $json.phone || '', mobilephone: $json.mobile_phone || '', company: $json.agency_name || $json.agent_name, website: $json.website || '', city: $json.city || '', state: $json.state || '', zip: $json.zip_code || '', hs_lead_status: 'NEW', ai_automation_score: $json.ai_score, automation_pain_signals: $json.ai_signals, lead_summary: $json.ai_summary, google_rating: $json.google_rating, review_count: $json.review_count, response_time_minutes: $json.response_time_minutes, has_live_chat: String($json.has_live_chat) } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ properties: { ai_automation_score: $json.ai_score, automation_pain_signals: $json.ai_signals, lead_summary: $json.ai_summary, response_time_minutes: $json.response_time_minutes } }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const res = $input.item.json;
return [{ json: { ...$('Prepare HubSpot Fields').item.json, hubspot_contact_id: res.id || null } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ properties: { dealname: ($json.agent_name || 'Unknown Agent') + ' — Live Chat + Lead Response', dealstage: 'appointmentscheduled', lead_score: $json.ai_score, pipeline: 'default' } }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ inputs: [{ from: { id: $json.hubspot_deal_id }, to: { id: $json.hubspot_contact_id }, type: 'deal_to_contact' }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ fields: { status: 'Pushed', date_pushed: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0], contact_email: $json.contact_email || '', contact_name: $json.contact_name || '', mobile_phone: $json.mobile_phone || '', hubspot_contact_id: $json.hubspot_contact_id || '' } }) }}
